title: SYNTHESIS OF SORBENTS USED IN THE SEPARATION OF HALOGENS
author: F.I.Murtazaev
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The article studied the synthesis of sorbents for the extraction of three halogens, and used sorption methods to concentrate metal vagalogen ions. Ion-exchange and complex-forming polymers and polymer materials were obtained, and ion-exchange materials were obtained on the basis of polyacrylonitrile and polyvinyl chloride obtained at "Navoyazot" OJSC.
steps_raw: The article studied the synthesis of sorbents for the extraction of three halogens, and used sorption methods to concentrate metal vagalogen ions. Ion-exchange and complex-forming polymers and polymer materials were obtained, and ion-exchange materials were obtained on the basis of polyacrylonitrile and polyvinyl chloride obtained at "Navoyazot" OJSC.
